title: Hideout in the Alps
writer: Neil Grant, L. du Garde Peach, Michael Hankinson
actors: Ronald Squire, Jane Baxter, Anthony Bushell
plot: A forger returns to his family when he leaves jail, vowing to go straight. Although approached by an international counterfeiting gang, he keeps his word, only to find his nephew is in the Swiss Alps helping the crooks. He sets of...
